name: AI Agent
summary: AI Agent 对话系统，包括 Agent 生命周期管理、消息交换、工具事件可视化和斜杠命令。
goals: Manage agent lifecycle: create, destroy, restore sessions
Enable real-time message exchange with streaming
Visualize 12+ tool event types as interactive cards
Support slash commands and model selection

acceptanceCriteria.then: Agent 流式返回结果，工具调用显示为可折叠卡片

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: refactor(specs): restructure spec tree with flatter node hierarchy
